verses.geez: ወኀበረ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ወጸርሑ ፡ በቃል ፡ ወበከዩ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሌሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And all the congregation lifted up their voice and cried; and the people wept all that night.
translations.kjv: And all the congregation lifted up their voice, and cried; and the people wept that night.

verses.geez:
ወአንጐርጐሩ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ አሮን ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡
                  ኀየሰነ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ሞትነ ፡ በብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እምነ ፡ ንሙት ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: And all the children of Israel murmured against Moses and Aaron; and all the congregation said to them,
translations.kjv: And all the children of Israel murmured against Moses and against Aaron: and the whole congregation said unto them, Would God that we had died in the land of Egypt! or would God we had died in this wilderness!

verses.geez:
ወለምንት ፡ ይወስደነ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ከመ ፡ ንደቅ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ቀትል ፡ ወአንስቲያነኒ ፡
                  ወደቂቅነሂ ፡ ይከውኑ ፡ ሕብልያ ፡ ወይእዜኒ ፡ ይኄይሰነ ፡ ንግባእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: Would we had died in the land of Egypt! or in this wilderness, would we had died! and why does the Lord bring us into this land to fall in war? our wives and our children shall be for a prey: now then it is better to return into Egypt.
translations.kjv: And wherefore hath the LORD brought us unto this land, to fall by the sword, that our wives and our children should be a prey? were it not better for us to return into Egypt?

verses.geez: ወተባሀሉ ፡ በበይናቲሆሙ ፡ ሀቡነ ፡ ናንግሥ ፡ ለነ ፡ ወንግባእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ።

translations.lxx: And they said one to another, Let us make a ruler, and return into Egypt.
translations.kjv: And they said one to another, Let us make a captain, and let us return into Egypt.

verses.geez: ወወድቁ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወአሮን ፡ በገጾሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Moses and Aaron fell upon their face before all the congregation of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: Then Moses and Aaron fell on their faces before all the assembly of the congregation of the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወኢያሱ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ፡ ወእብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኒ ፡ እለ ፡ እምውስቴቶሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡ ርእይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  ሠጠጡ ፡ አልባሲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: But Joshua the son of Naue, and Chaleb the son of Jephonne, of the number of them that spied out the land, rent their garments,
translations.kjv: And Joshua the son of Nun, and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, which were of them that searched the land, rent their clothes:

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ምድርሰ ፡ እንተ ፡ ርኢነ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወፈድፋደ ።

translations.lxx: and spoke to all the congregation of the children of Israel, saying, The land which we surveyed is indeed extremely good.
translations.kjv: And they spake unto all the company of the children of Israel, saying, The land, which we passed through to search it, is an exceeding good land.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኀርየነ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያብአነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወይሁበነሃ ፡ ለነ ፤ ምድር ፡ ይእቲ
                  ፡ ለነ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትውሕዝ ፡ ሐሊበ ፡ ወመዓረ ።

translations.lxx: If the Lord choose us, he will bring us into this land, and give it us; a land which flows with milk and honey.
translations.kjv: If the LORD delight in us, then he will bring us into this land, and give it us; a land which floweth with milk and honey.

verses.geez:
ወባሕቱ ፡ ኢትኩኑ ፡ ከሓድያነ ፡ በእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወኢትፍርህዎሙ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ለሕዝባ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ንሕነ ፡ ናጠፍኦሙ ፡ ወእስመ ፡ ኀለፈ ፡ መዋዕሊሆሙ ፡ ወእስመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሀለወ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ኢትፍርህዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: Only depart not from the Lord; and fear ye not the people of the land, for they are meat for us; for the season of prosperity is departed from them, but the Lord is among us: fear them not.
translations.kjv: Only rebel not ye against the LORD, neither fear ye the people of the land; for they are bread for us: their defence is departed from them, and the LORD is with us: fear them not.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሉ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ከመ ፡ ይወግርዎሙ ፡ በእብን ፡ ወአስተርአየ ፡ ስብሐተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በደመና ፡ ኀበ ፡
                  ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And all the congregation bade stone them with stones; and the glory of the Lord appeared in the cloud on the tabernacle of witness to all the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: But all the congregation bade stone them with stones. And the glory of the LORD appeared in the tabernacle of the congregation before all the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ እስከ ፡ ማእዜኑ ፡ ይዌሕከኒ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ማእዜኑ ፡ ኢየአምኑኒ ፡
                  በኵሉ ፡ ተአምርየ ፡ ዘገበርኩ ፡ ሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, How long does this people provoke me? and how long do they refuse to believe me for all the signs which I have wrought among them?
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, How long will this people provoke me? and how long will it be ere they believe me, for all the signs which I have shewed among them?

verses.geez:
እቅትሎሙኑ ፡ በሞት ፡ ወአጥፍኦሙ ፡ ወእሬስየከ ፡ ለከ ፡ ወለቤተ ፡ አቡከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ዘይበዝኅ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ፈድፋደ ።

translations.lxx: I will smite them with death, and destroy them; and I will make of thee and of thy father's house a great nation, and much greater than this.
translations.kjv: I will smite them with the pestilence, and disinherit them, and will make of thee a greater nation and mightier than they.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይሰምዑ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እለ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ አውፃእኮሙ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ በኀይልከ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said to the Lord, So Egypt shall hear, for thou hast brought up this people from them by thy might.
translations.kjv: And Moses said unto the LORD, Then the Egyptians shall hear it, (for thou broughtest up this people in thy might from among them;)

verses.geez:
ወይሰምዑ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ከመ ፡ አንተ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሀለውከ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  ዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወአንተ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ታስተርኢ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ከመዘ ፡ ዐይነ ፡ በዐይን ፡ ይትረአይ ፡ ወደመናከ ፡ ቆመት ፡
                  መልዕልቴሆሙ ፡ ወበዐምደ ፡ ደመና ፡ አንተ ፡ ሖርከ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ መዐልተ ፡ ወበዐምደ ፡ እሳት ፡ ሌሊተ ።

translations.lxx: Moreover all the dwellers upon this land have heard that thou art Lord in the midst of this people, who, O Lord, art seen by them face to face, and thy cloud rests upon them, and thou goest before them by day in a pillar of a cloud, and by night in a pillar of fire.
translations.kjv: And they will tell it to the inhabitants of this land: for they have heard that thou LORD art among this people, that thou LORD art seen face to face, and that thy cloud standeth over them, and that thou goest before them, by day time in a pillar of a cloud, and in a pillar of fire by night.

verses.geez:
ወለእመ ፡ ቀጥቀጥካሁ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ከመዘ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ይብሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ እለ ፡ ይሰምዑ ፡ ስመከ ፡
                  ይብሉ ፤

translations.lxx: And if thou shalt destroy this nation as one man; then all the nations that have heard thy name shall speak, saying,
translations.kjv: Now if thou shalt kill all this people as one man, then the nations which have heard the fame of thee will speak, saying,

verses.geez: እስመ ፡ ስእነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አብኦቶሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መሐለ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ቀተሎሙ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: Because the Lord could not bring this people into the land which he sware to them, he has overthrown them in the wilderness.
translations.kjv: Because the LORD was not able to bring this people into the land which he sware unto them, therefore he hath slain them in the wilderness.

verses.geez: ወይእዜኒ ፡ ለይትላዐል ፡ ኀይልከ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ትብል ፤

translations.lxx: And now, O Lord, let thy strength be exalted, as thou spakest, saying,
translations.kjv: And now, I beseech thee, let the power of my LORD be great, according as thou hast spoken, saying,

verses.geez:
እግዚአብሔር ፡ ርሑቀ ፡ መዐት ፡ ወብዙኀ ፡ ምሕረት ፡ ወጻድቅ ፡ ዘየኀድግ ፡ ዐመፃ ፡ ወኀጢአተ ፡ ወጌጋየ ፡ ወአንጽሖኒ
                  ፡ ኢያነጽሖ ፡ ለመአብስ ፡ ወይትፈደይ ፡ ኀጣይአ ፡ ወላዲ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ውሉድ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሣልስት ፡ ወራብዕት ፡ ትውልድ ።

translations.lxx: The Lord is long-suffering and merciful, and true, removing transgressions and iniquities and sins, and he will by no means clear the guilty, visiting the sins of the fathers upon the children to the third and fourth generation.
translations.kjv: The LORD is longsuffering, and of great mercy, forgiving iniquity and transgression, and by no means clearing the guilty, visiting the iniquity of the fathers upon the children unto the third and fourth generation.

verses.geez:
ኅድግ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ኀጣይኢሆሙ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ በከመ ፡ ዕበየ ፡ ምሕረትከ ፡ ወበከመ ፡ መሓሬ ፡ ኮንከ ፡ ሎሙ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይእዜ ።

translations.lxx: Forgive this people their sin according to thy great mercy, as thou wast favourable to them from Egypt until now.
translations.kjv: Pardon, I beseech thee, the iniquity of this people according unto the greatness of thy mercy, and as thou hast forgiven this people, from Egypt even until now.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ምህርክዎሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, I am gracious to them according to thy word.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said, I have pardoned according to thy word:

verses.geez: አላ ፡ ሕያው ፡ አነ ፡ ወሕያው ፡ ስምየ ፡ ወይመልእ ፡ ስብሐቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ምድረ ፤

translations.lxx: But as I live and my name is living, so the glory of the Lord shall fill all the earth.
translations.kjv: But as truly as I live, all the earth shall be filled with the glory of the LORD.

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ርእይዎ ፡ ለስብሐቲየ ፡ ወለተአምርየ ፡ ዘገበርኩ ፡ [በ]ብሔረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ [ወበገዳም
                  ፡] ወእምዝ ፡ አመከሩኒ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ዓሥር ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ወኢሰምዑ ፡ ቃልየ ፤

translations.lxx: For all the men who see my glory, and the signs which I wrought in Egypt, and in the wilderness, and have tempted me this tenth time, and have not hearkened to my voice,
translations.kjv: Because all those men which have seen my glory, and my miracles, which I did in Egypt and in the wilderness, and have tempted me now these ten times, and have not hearkened to my voice;

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ኢይሬእይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መሐልኩ ፡ ለአበዊሆሙ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ውሉዶሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ምስሌየ
                  ፡ ዝየ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ኢያአምሩ ፡ ሠናይተ ፡ ወእኪተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንኡስ ፡ ዘአልቦ ፡ ዘያአምር ፡ ሎሙ ፡ እሁባ ፡ ለይእቲ
                  ፡ ምድር ፡ ወኵሎሙ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ እለ ፡ ወሐኩኒ ፡ ኢይሬእይዋ ።

translations.lxx: surely they shall not see the land, which I sware to their fathers; but their children which are with me here, as many as know not good or evil, every inexperienced youth, to them will I give the land; but none who have provoked me shall see it.
translations.kjv: Surely they shall not see the land which I sware unto their fathers, neither shall any of them that provoked me see it:

verses.geez:
ወቍልዔየ ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ካሌብ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኮነ ፡ ካልእ ፡ መንፈስ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ወተለወኒ ፡ አበውኦ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ ቦአ ፡ ህየ ፡ ወዘርኡ ፡ ይትዋረሳ ።

translations.lxx: But my servant Chaleb, because there was another spirit in him, and he followed me, I will bring him into the land into which he entered, and his seed shall inherit it.
translations.kjv: But my servant Caleb, because he had another spirit with him, and hath followed me fully, him will I bring into the land whereinto he went; and his seed shall possess it.

verses.geez:
ወዐማሌቅ ፡ ወከናአን ፡ ንቡራን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ አውርዮን ፤ ወአንትሙሰ ፡ ገዐዙ ፡ ወግብኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡
                  ዘፍኖተ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ኤርትራ ።

translations.lxx: But Amalec and the Chananite dwell in the valley: to-morrow turn and depart for the wilderness by the way of the Red Sea.
translations.kjv: (Now the Amalekites and the Canaanites dwelt in the valley.) Tomorrow turn you, and get you into the wilderness by the way of the Red sea.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወለአሮን ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

verses.geez:
እስከ ፡ ማእዜኑ ፡ አሰምዖሙ ፡ ነጐርጓሮሙ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ ዘያንጐረጕሩ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ዘአንጐርጐሩ ፡ በቅድሜየ ።

translations.lxx: How long shall I endure this wicked congregation? I have heard their murmurings against me, even the murmuring of the children of Israel, which they have murmured concerning you.
translations.kjv: How long shall I bear with this evil congregation, which murmur against me? I have heard the murmurings of the children of Israel, which they murmur against me.

verses.geez:
በሎሙ ፡ ሕያው ፡ አነ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ እመ ፡ አኮ ፡ ዳእሙ ፡ በከመ ፡ ነበብ[ክሙ] ፡ ውስተ ፡ እ[ዝንየ] ፡
                  ከማሁ ፡ እገብረክሙ ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: Say to them, As I live, saith the Lord: surely as ye spoke into my ears, so will I do to you.
translations.kjv: Say unto them, As truly as I live, saith the LORD, as ye have spoken in mine ears, so will I do to you:

verses.geez:
ወይወድቅ ፡ አብድንቲክሙ ፡ ወኵልክሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ተፋቀድክሙ ፡ ወእለ ፡ ተኈለቍክሙ ፡ ዘእም ፡ ፳ዓም ፡ ወላዕሉ ፡ እምኔሁ
                  ፡ ኵልክሙ ፡ እለ ፡ አንጐርጐርክሙ ፡ ላዕሌየ ፤

translations.lxx: Your carcases shall fall in this wilderness; and all those of you that were reviewed, and those of you that were numbered from twenty years old and upward, all that murmured against me,
translations.kjv: Your carcases shall fall in this wilderness; and all that were numbered of you, according to your whole number, from twenty years old and upward, which have murmured against me,

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ኢትበውእዋ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ሰፋሕኩ ፡ እዴየ ፡ ከመ ፡ አንብርክሙ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ እንበለ
                  ፡ ካሌብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኒ ፡ ወኢየሱስ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ።

translations.lxx: ye shall not enter into the land for which I stretched out my hand to establish you upon it; except only Chaleb the son of Jephonne, and Joshua the son of Naue.
translations.kjv: Doubtless ye shall not come into the land, concerning which I sware to make you dwell therein, save Caleb the son of Jephunneh, and Joshua the son of Nun.

verses.geez:
ወደቂቀ ፡ እለ ፡ ትቤሉ ፡ ሕብልያ ፡ ይከውኑ ፡ አበውኦሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወይትዋረስዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር
                  ፡ እንተ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ተራሐቅክሙ ፡ እምኔሃ ።

translations.lxx: And your little ones, who ye said should be a prey, them will I bring into the land; and they shall inherit the land, which ye rejected.
translations.kjv: But your little ones, which ye said should be a prey, them will I bring in, and they shall know the land which ye have despised.

verses.geez: ወይወድቅ ፡ አብድንቲክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: And your carcases shall fall in this wilderness.
translations.kjv: But as for you, your carcases, they shall fall in this wilderness.

verses.geez: ወይትረዐዩ ፡ ደቂቅክሙ ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ዓመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፤

translations.lxx: And your sons shall be fed in the wilderness forty years, and they shall bear your fornication, until your carcases be consumed in the wilderness.
translations.kjv: And your children shall wander in the wilderness forty years, and bear your whoredoms, until your carcases be wasted in the wilderness.

verses.geez:
በከመ ፡ ኍለቊሆሙ ፡ ለእልክቱ ፡ መዋዕል ፡ እለ ፡ ቦንቱ ፡ ርእይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ አርብዓ ፡ ዕለተ ፤ አሐቲ ፡
                  ዕለት ፡ ዓመተ ፡ ትከውነክሙ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአትክሙ ፡ ወይኩንክሙ ፡ ፵ዓመ ፡ ወታአምሩ ፡ እንከ ፡ መንሱተ ፡ መዐትየ ።

translations.lxx: According to the number of the days during which ye spied the land, forty days, a day for a year, ye shall bear your sins forty years, and ye shall know my fierce anger.
translations.kjv: After the number of the days in which ye searched the land, even forty days, each day for a year, shall ye bear your iniquities, even forty years, and ye shall know my breach of promise.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘነብኩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ እገብራ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ትዕይንት ፡ እኪት ፡ እንተ ፡ ኀበረት ፡
                  ላዕሌየ ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ለይጥፍኡ ፡ ወበህየ ፡ ለይሙቱ ።

translations.lxx: I the Lord have spoken, Surely will I do thus to this evil congregation that has risen up together against me: in this wilderness they shall be utterly consumed, and there they shall die.
translations.kjv: I the LORD have said, I will surely do it unto all this evil congregation, that are gathered together against me: in this wilderness they shall be consumed, and there they shall die.

verses.geez:
ወእልክቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ፈነዎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ አመ ፡ ገብኡ ፡ አንጐርጐሩ ፡
                  በእንቲአሃ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ተዓይን ፡ ወአውፅኡ ፡ ነገረ ፡ እኩየ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፤

translations.lxx: And the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land, and who came and murmured against it to the assembly so as to bring out evil words concerning the land,—
translations.kjv: And the men, which Moses sent to search the land, who returned, and made all the congregation to murmur against him, by bringing up a slander upon the land,

verses.geez:
ወሞቱ ፡ ውእቶሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ይቤልዋ ፡ እኪት ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ወምድርሰ ፡ ሠናይት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ በቅድመ ፡
                  እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: the men that spoke evil reports against the land, even died of the plague before the Lord.
translations.kjv: Even those men that did bring up the evil report upon the land, died by the plague before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወኢያሱ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ነዌ ፡ ወካሌብ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ዬፎኔ ፡ እለ ፡ ኀይዉ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ለውእቶሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ሖሩ ፡
                  ይርአይዋ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua the son of Naue and Chaleb the son of Jephonne still lived of those men that went to spy out the land.
translations.kjv: But Joshua the son of Nun, and Caleb the son of Jephunneh, which were of the men that went to search the land, lived still.

verses.geez: ወነገሮሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወላሐወ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses spoke these words to all the children of Israel; and the people mourned exceedingly.
translations.kjv: And Moses told these sayings unto all the children of Israel: and the people mourned greatly.

verses.geez:
ወጌሡ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ ናሁ ፡ ንሕነ ፡ ነዐርግ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ መካን
                  ፡ ዘይቤለነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ አበስነ ፡ በእንቲአሁ ።

translations.lxx: And they rose early in the morning and went up to the top of the mountain, saying, Behold, we that are here will go up to the place of which the Lord has spoken, because we have sinned.
translations.kjv: And they rose up early in the morning, and gat them up into the top of the mountain, saying, Lo, we be here, and will go up unto the place which the LORD hath promised: for we have sinned.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለምንት ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ትትዓደዉ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኢኮነ ፡ ሠናይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ከመዝ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses said, Why do ye transgress the word of the Lord? ye shall not prosper.
translations.kjv: And Moses said, Wherefore now do ye transgress the commandment of the LORD? but it shall not prosper.

verses.geez: ኢትዕረጉ ፡ እስመ ፡ አሀለወ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ወትወድቁ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፀርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Go not up, for the Lord is not with you; so shall ye fall before the face of your enemies.
translations.kjv: Go not up, for the LORD is not among you; that ye be not smitten before your enemies.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ዐማሌቅ ፡ ወከናአን ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ህየ ፡ ቅድሜክሙ ፡ ወትወድቁ ፡ በኀፂን ፡ በበይነ ፡ ዘተመየጥክሙ ፡ ወክህድክምዎ
                  ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወኢሀለወ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: For Amalec and the Chananite are there before you, and ye shall fall by the sword; because ye have disobeyed the Lord and turned aside, and the Lord will not be among you.
translations.kjv: For the Amalekites and the Canaanites are there before you, and ye shall fall by the sword: because ye are turned away from the LORD, therefore the LORD will not be with you.

verses.geez:
ወተኀይሎሙ ፡ ዐርጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወታቦተ ፡ ሕጉሰ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሙሴሂ ፡ ኢተሐውሱ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  ማእከለ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And having forced their passage, they went up to the top of the mountain; but the ark of the covenant of the Lord and Moses stirred not out of the camp.
translations.kjv: But they presumed to go up unto the hill top: nevertheless the ark of the covenant of the LORD, and Moses, departed not out of the camp.

verses.geez:
ወወረዱ ፡ ዐማሌቅ ፡ ወከናአን ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ደብር ፡ ወሰደድዎሙ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኤርማ ፡ ወገብኡ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ትዕይንት ።

translations.lxx: And Amalec and the Chananite that dwelt in that mountain came down, and routed them, and destroyed them unto Herman; and they returned to the camp.
translations.kjv: Then the Amalekites came down, and the Canaanites which dwelt in that hill, and smote them, and discomfited them, even unto Hormah.
